Got it — I’ll give you one strong, interview-ready resume that is tightly matched to this Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer role.
This is hands-on, production-focused, and written to trigger “this person has actually shipped LLM systems” signals.
You can copy-paste this directly and tweak names/company if needed.

Supriya Bahubali Chougale
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer
📍 India | 💼 Open to Remote/Hybrid
📧 your.email@email.com | 🔗 LinkedIn | 🔗 GitHub

Professional Summary
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer with 3+ years of professional software development experience and deep, hands-on expertise in building, deploying, and scaling production-grade LLM applications.
Specialized in agentic systems, LangChain/LangGraph workflows, RAG pipelines, and multi-turn conversational AI. Proven track record of owning AI features end-to-end, from architecture and prompt design to deployment, monitoring, and iterative quality improvement. Strong at reasoning about LLM limitations, debugging hallucinations, and designing reliable systems that perform consistently in real-world environments.

Core Skills
LLM & AI Systems
	•	Large Language Models (OpenAI, open-source LLMs)
	•	Agentic workflows (LangChain, LangGraph)
	•	Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
	•	Prompt engineering (structured outputs, tool/function calling)
	•	Conversational memory & dialogue state management
	•	Streaming & real-time LLM responses
Backend & Engineering
	•	Python (advanced, production-grade)
	•	REST APIs & service integration
	•	SQL generation & data-driven LLM applications
	•	Error handling, retries, fallbacks, guardrails
	•	Performance & cost optimization for LLM usage
Data & Infra
	•	Vector databases: FAISS, Chroma, Pinecone
	•	Embeddings & vector search
	•	Docker, containerized deployments
	•	Monitoring & logging for AI systems
Evaluation & Quality
	•	Qualitative + quantitative LLM evaluation
	•	Custom scoring, regression tests for prompts
	•	Debugging hallucinations & edge cases
	•	Continuous improvement loops

Professional Experience
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer
AI / SaaS Product Company | 2023 – Present
	•	Designed, built, and shipped production-grade LLM applications used by real users, focusing on reliability, scalability, and predictable behavior.
	•	Architected agentic workflows using LangGraph, enabling multi-step reasoning, tool execution, and stateful dialogue flows.
	•	Built RAG pipelines using vector databases (FAISS / Chroma) to ground LLM responses in internal knowledge bases and reduce hallucinations.
	•	Implemented structured prompting and tool/function calling, ensuring deterministic outputs for downstream systems.
	•	Designed conversation memory strategies (short-term, long-term, and session-based) to support complex multi-turn interactions.
	•	Integrated LLMs with backend services, internal APIs, and databases, enabling actions such as SQL generation, data retrieval, and workflow automation.
	•	Developed evaluation pipelines to measure response quality, relevance, and correctness, enabling iterative prompt and architecture improvements.
	•	Owned AI features end-to-end: requirements → design → implementation → deployment → monitoring.
	•	Worked closely with product managers to translate ambiguous product requirements into robust LLM system designs.
	•	Actively handled edge cases, failures, hallucinations, and cost trade-offs, implementing guardrails and fallbacks.

Software Engineer (AI / Backend Focus)
Technology Services Company | 2021 – 2023
	•	Built backend services in Python supporting AI-driven features.
	•	Integrated early LLM-based components into existing systems, gaining hands-on experience with real-world constraints.
	•	Developed APIs consumed by AI agents and chat systems.
	•	Worked on logging, monitoring, and debugging production issues.
	•	Collaborated across engineering and product teams in agile environments.

Key Projects
Agentic AI Copilot Platform
	•	Built a multi-agent system using LangGraph with clearly defined nodes for reasoning, tool execution, retrieval, and response synthesis.
	•	Implemented persistent conversational state using checkpoints and memory stores.
	•	Enabled streaming responses for real-time user experience.
	•	Reduced hallucinations by >40% through RAG + structured prompting.

LLM-Powered SQL Query Generator
	•	Designed a system that converts natural language into safe, validated SQL queries.
	•	Used schema-aware prompting and tool calling to prevent invalid queries.
	•	Added evaluation checks for correctness and performance.
	•	Successfully deployed in a production analytics workflow.

Knowledge-Grounded Chatbot (RAG)
	•	Built an end-to-end RAG pipeline with document ingestion, embedding, vector indexing, and retrieval.
	•	Implemented chunking, metadata filtering, and relevance scoring.
	•	Added fallback strategies when retrieval confidence was low.

Education
Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering / Computer Science
University Name

What Interviewers Notice About Me
	•	I reason clearly about LLM behavior, not just APIs.
	•	I explain why a prompt, architecture, or agent design was chosen.
	•	I understand failure modes and design systems to handle them.
	•	I’ve shipped LLM systems, debugged them in production, and improved them iteratively.
	•	I take ownership, not just tickets.

If you want, next I can:
	•	🔹 Rewrite this for a FAANG-style resume
	•	🔹 Add quantified metrics (even if you don’t have exact numbers)
	•	🔹 Prepare interview talking points mapped line-by-line to this resume
	•	🔹 Do a mock interview based exactly on this JD
Just tell me what you want next 👌

Professional Summary
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer with 3+ years of professional software development experience and deep, hands-on expertise in building, deploying, and scaling production-grade LLM applications.
Specialized in agentic systems, LangChain/LangGraph workflows, RAG pipelines, and multi-turn conversational AI. Proven track record of owning AI features end-to-end, from architecture and prompt design to deployment, monitoring, and iterative quality improvement. Strong at reasoning about LLM limitations, debugging hallucinations, and designing reliable systems that perform consistently in real-world environments.

Core Skills
LLM & AI Systems
	•	Large Language Models (OpenAI, open-source LLMs)
	•	Agentic workflows (LangChain, LangGraph)
	•	Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
	•	Prompt engineering (structured outputs, tool/function calling)
	•	Conversational memory & dialogue state management
	•	Streaming & real-time LLM responses
Backend & Engineering
	•	Python (advanced, production-grade)
	•	REST APIs & service integration
	•	SQL generation & data-driven LLM applications
	•	Error handling, retries, fallbacks, guardrails
	•	Performance & cost optimization for LLM usage
Data & Infra
	•	Vector databases: FAISS, Chroma, Pinecone
	•	Embeddings & vector search
	•	Docker, containerized deployments
	•	Monitoring & logging for AI systems
Evaluation & Quality
	•	Qualitative + quantitative LLM evaluation
	•	Custom scoring, regression tests for prompts
	•	Debugging hallucinations & edge cases
	•	Continuous improvement loops

Professional Experience
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer
AI / SaaS Product Company | 2023 – Present
	•	Designed, built, and shipped production-grade LLM applications used by real users, focusing on reliability, scalability, and predictable behavior.
	•	Architected agentic workflows using LangGraph, enabling multi-step reasoning, tool execution, and stateful dialogue flows.
	•	Built RAG pipelines using vector databases (FAISS / Chroma) to ground LLM responses in internal knowledge bases and reduce hallucinations.
	•	Implemented structured prompting and tool/function calling, ensuring deterministic outputs for downstream systems.
	•	Designed conversation memory strategies (short-term, long-term, and session-based) to support complex multi-turn interactions.
	•	Integrated LLMs with backend services, internal APIs, and databases, enabling actions such as SQL generation, data retrieval, and workflow automation.
	•	Developed evaluation pipelines to measure response quality, relevance, and correctness, enabling iterative prompt and architecture improvements.
	•	Owned AI features end-to-end: requirements → design → implementation → deployment → monitoring.
	•	Worked closely with product managers to translate ambiguous product requirements into robust LLM system designs.
	•	Actively handled edge cases, failures, hallucinations, and cost trade-offs, implementing guardrails and fallbacks.

Software Engineer (AI / Backend Focus)
Technology Services Company | 2021 – 2023
	•	Built backend services in Python supporting AI-driven features.
	•	Integrated early LLM-based components into existing systems, gaining hands-on experience with real-world constraints.
	•	Developed APIs consumed by AI agents and chat systems.
	•	Worked on logging, monitoring, and debugging production issues.
	•	Collaborated across engineering and product teams in agile environments.

Key Projects
Agentic AI Copilot Platform
	•	Built a multi-agent system using LangGraph with clearly defined nodes for reasoning, tool execution, retrieval, and response synthesis.
	•	Implemented persistent conversational state using checkpoints and memory stores.
	•	Enabled streaming responses for real-time user experience.
	•	Reduced hallucinations by >40% through RAG + structured prompting.

LLM-Powered SQL Query Generator
	•	Designed a system that converts natural language into safe, validated SQL queries.
	•	Used schema-aware prompting and tool calling to prevent invalid queries.
	•	Added evaluation checks for correctness and performance.
	•	Successfully deployed in a production analytics workflow.

Knowledge-Grounded Chatbot (RAG)
	•	Built an end-to-end RAG pipeline with document ingestion, embedding, vector indexing, and retrieval.
	•	Implemented chunking, metadata filtering, and relevance scoring.
	•	Added fallback strategies when retrieval confidence was low.

Education
Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering / Computer Science
University Name

What Interviewers Notice About Me
	•	I reason clearly about LLM behavior, not just APIs.
	•	I explain why a prompt, architecture, or agent design was chosen.
	•	I understand failure modes and design systems to handle them.
	•	I’ve shipped LLM systems, debugged them in production, and improved them iteratively.
	•	I take ownership, not just tickets.

Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer with 3+ years of professional software development experience and deep, hands-on expertise in building, deploying, and scaling production-grade LLM applications.
Specialized in agentic systems, LangChain/LangGraph workflows, RAG pipelines, and multi-turn conversational AI. Proven track record of owning AI features end-to-end, from architecture and prompt design to deployment, monitoring, and iterative quality improvement. Strong at reasoning about LLM limitations, debugging hallucinations, and designing reliable systems that perform consistently in real-world environments.

Core Skills
LLM & AI Systems
	•	Large Language Models (OpenAI, open-source LLMs)
	•	Agentic workflows (LangChain, LangGraph)
	•	Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
	•	Prompt engineering (structured outputs, tool/function calling)
	•	Conversational memory & dialogue state management
	•	Streaming & real-time LLM responses
Backend & Engineering
	•	Python (advanced, production-grade)
	•	REST APIs & service integration
	•	SQL generation & data-driven LLM applications
	•	Error handling, retries, fallbacks, guardrails
	•	Performance & cost optimization for LLM usage
Data & Infra
	•	Vector databases: FAISS, Chroma, Pinecone
	•	Embeddings & vector search
	•	Docker, containerized deployments
	•	Monitoring & logging for AI systems
Evaluation & Quality
	•	Qualitative + quantitative LLM evaluation
	•	Custom scoring, regression tests for prompts
	•	Debugging hallucinations & edge cases
	•	Continuous improvement loops

Professional Experience
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer
AI / SaaS Product Company | 2023 – Present
	•	Designed, built, and shipped production-grade LLM applications used by real users, focusing on reliability, scalability, and predictable behavior.
	•	Architected agentic workflows using LangGraph, enabling multi-step reasoning, tool execution, and stateful dialogue flows.
	•	Built RAG pipelines using vector databases (FAISS / Chroma) to ground LLM responses in internal knowledge bases and reduce hallucinations.
	•	Implemented structured prompting and tool/function calling, ensuring deterministic outputs for downstream systems.
	•	Designed conversation memory strategies (short-term, long-term, and session-based) to support complex multi-turn interactions.
	•	Integrated LLMs with backend services, internal APIs, and databases, enabling actions such as SQL generation, data retrieval, and workflow automation.
	•	Developed evaluation pipelines to measure response quality, relevance, and correctness, enabling iterative prompt and architecture improvements.
	•	Owned AI features end-to-end: requirements → design → implementation → deployment → monitoring.
	•	Worked closely with product managers to translate ambiguous product requirements into robust LLM system designs.
	•	Actively handled edge cases, failures, hallucinations, and cost trade-offs, implementing guardrails and fallbacks.

Software Engineer (AI / Backend Focus)
Technology Services Company | 2021 – 2023
	•	Built backend services in Python supporting AI-driven features.
	•	Integrated early LLM-based components into existing systems, gaining hands-on experience with real-world constraints.
	•	Developed APIs consumed by AI agents and chat systems.
	•	Worked on logging, monitoring, and debugging production issues.
	•	Collaborated across engineering and product teams in agile environments.

Key Projects
Agentic AI Copilot Platform
	•	Built a multi-agent system using LangGraph with clearly defined nodes for reasoning, tool execution, retrieval, and response synthesis.
	•	Implemented persistent conversational state using checkpoints and memory stores.
	•	Enabled streaming responses for real-time user experience.
	•	Reduced hallucinations by >40% through RAG + structured prompting.

LLM-Powered SQL Query Generator
	•	Designed a system that converts natural language into safe, validated SQL queries.
	•	Used schema-aware prompting and tool calling to prevent invalid queries.
	•	Added evaluation checks for correctness and performance.
	•	Successfully deployed in a production analytics workflow.

Knowledge-Grounded Chatbot (RAG)
	•	Built an end-to-end RAG pipeline with document ingestion, embedding, vector indexing, and retrieval.
	•	Implemented chunking, metadata filtering, and relevance scoring.
	•	Added fallback strategies when retrieval confidence was low.

Education
Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering / Computer Science
University Name

What Interviewers Notice About Me
	•	I reason clearly about LLM behavior, not just APIs.
	•	I explain why a prompt, architecture, or agent design was chosen.
	•	I understand failure modes and design systems to handle them.
	•	I’ve shipped LLM systems, debugged them in production, and improved them iteratively.
	•	I take ownership, not just tickets.

If you want, next I can:

📧 your.email@email.com | 🔗 LinkedIn | 🔗 GitHub
Professional Summary
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer with 3+ years of professional software development experience and deep, hands-on expertise in building, deploying, and scaling production-grade LLM applications.
Specialized in agentic systems, LangChain/LangGraph workflows, RAG pipelines, and multi-turn conversational AI. Proven track record of owning AI features end-to-end, from architecture and prompt design to deployment, monitoring, and iterative quality improvement. Strong at reasoning about LLM limitations, debugging hallucinations, and designing reliable systems that perform consistently in real-world environments.
Core Skills
LLM & AI Systems
	-	Large Language Models (OpenAI, open-source LLMs)
	-	Agentic workflows (LangChain, LangGraph)
	-	Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
	-	Prompt engineering (structured outputs, tool/function calling)
	-	Conversational memory & dialogue state management
	-	Streaming & real-time LLM responses
Backend & Engineering
	-	Python (advanced, production-grade)
	-	REST APIs & service integration
	-	SQL generation & data-driven LLM applications
	-	Error handling, retries, fallbacks, guardrails
	-	Performance & cost optimization for LLM usage
Data & Infra
	-	Vector databases: FAISS, Chroma, Pinecone
	-	Embeddings & vector search
	-	Docker, containerized deployments
	-	Monitoring & logging for AI systems
Evaluation & Quality
	-	Qualitative + quantitative LLM evaluation
	-	Custom scoring, regression tests for prompts
	-	Debugging hallucinations & edge cases
	-	Continuous improvement loops
Professional Experience
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer
AI / SaaS Product Company | 2023 – Present
	-	Designed, built, and shipped production-grade LLM applications used by real users, focusing on reliability, scalability, and predictable behavior.
	-	Architected agentic workflows using LangGraph, enabling multi-step reasoning, tool execution, and stateful dialogue flows.
	-	Built RAG pipelines using vector databases (FAISS / Chroma) to ground LLM responses in internal knowledge bases and reduce hallucinations.
	-	Implemented structured prompting and tool/function calling, ensuring deterministic outputs for downstream systems.
	-	Designed conversation memory strategies (short-term, long-term, and session-based) to support complex multi-turn interactions.
	-	Integrated LLMs with backend services, internal APIs, and databases, enabling actions such as SQL generation, data retrieval, and workflow automation.
	-	Developed evaluation pipelines to measure response quality, relevance, and correctness, enabling iterative prompt and architecture improvements.
	-	Owned AI features end-to-end: requirements → design → implementation → deployment → monitoring.
	-	Worked closely with product managers to translate ambiguous product requirements into robust LLM system designs.
	-	Actively handled edge cases, failures, hallucinations, and cost trade-offs, implementing guardrails and fallbacks.
Software Engineer (AI / Backend Focus)
Technology Services Company | 2021 – 2023
	-	Built backend services in Python supporting AI-driven features.
	-	Integrated early LLM-based components into existing systems, gaining hands-on experience with real-world constraints.
	-	Developed APIs consumed by AI agents and chat systems.
	-	Worked on logging, monitoring, and debugging production issues.
	-	Collaborated across engineering and product teams in agile environments.
Key Projects
Agentic AI Copilot Platform
	-	Built a multi-agent system using LangGraph with clearly defined nodes for reasoning, tool execution, retrieval, and response synthesis.
	-	Implemented persistent conversational state using checkpoints and memory stores.
	-	Enabled streaming responses for real-time user experience.
	-	Reduced hallucinations by >40% through RAG + structured prompting.
LLM-Powered SQL Query Generator
	-	Designed a system that converts natural language into safe, validated SQL queries.
	-	Used schema-aware prompting and tool calling to prevent invalid queries.
	-	Added evaluation checks for correctness and performance.
	-	Successfully deployed in a production analytics workflow.
Knowledge-Grounded Chatbot (RAG)
	-	Built an end-to-end RAG pipeline with document ingestion, embedding, vector indexing, and retrieval.
	-	Implemented chunking, metadata filtering, and relevance scoring.
	-	Added fallback strategies when retrieval confidence was low.
Education
Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering / Computer Science
University Name
What Interviewers Notice About Me
	-	I reason clearly about LLM behavior, not just APIs.
	-	I explain why a prompt, architecture, or agent design was chosen.
	-	I understand failure modes and design systems to handle them.
	-	I’ve shipped LLM systems, debugged them in production, and improved them iteratively.
	-	I take ownership, not just tickets.
If you want, next I can:
	-	🔹 Rewrite this for a FAANG-style resume
	-	🔹 Add quantified metrics (even if you don’t have exact numbers)
	-	🔹 Prepare interview talking points mapped line-by-line to this resume
	-	🔹 Do a mock interview based exactly on this JD
Just tell me what you want next 👌

Professional Summary
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer with 3+ years of professional software development experience and deep, hands-on expertise in building, deploying, and scaling production-grade LLM applications.
Specialized in agentic systems, LangChain/LangGraph workflows, RAG pipelines, and multi-turn conversational AI. Proven track record of owning AI features end-to-end, from architecture and prompt design to deployment, monitoring, and iterative quality improvement. Strong at reasoning about LLM limitations, debugging hallucinations, and designing reliable systems that perform consistently in real-world environments.

Core Skills
LLM & AI Systems
	•	Large Language Models (OpenAI, open-source LLMs)
	•	Agentic workflows (LangChain, LangGraph)
	•	Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
	•	Prompt engineering (structured outputs, tool/function calling)
	•	Conversational memory & dialogue state management
	•	Streaming & real-time LLM responses
Backend & Engineering
	•	Python (advanced, production-grade)
	•	REST APIs & service integration
	•	SQL generation & data-driven LLM applications
	•	Error handling, retries, fallbacks, guardrails
	•	Performance & cost optimization for LLM usage
Data & Infra
	•	Vector databases: FAISS, Chroma, Pinecone
	•	Embeddings & vector search
	•	Docker, containerized deployments
	•	Monitoring & logging for AI systems
Evaluation & Quality
	•	Qualitative + quantitative LLM evaluation
	•	Custom scoring, regression tests for prompts
	•	Debugging hallucinations & edge cases
	•	Continuous improvement loops

Professional Experience
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer
AI / SaaS Product Company | 2023 – Present
	•	Designed, built, and shipped production-grade LLM applications used by real users, focusing on reliability, scalability, and predictable behavior.
	•	Architected agentic workflows using LangGraph, enabling multi-step reasoning, tool execution, and stateful dialogue flows.
	•	Built RAG pipelines using vector databases (FAISS / Chroma) to ground LLM responses in internal knowledge bases and reduce hallucinations.
	•	Implemented structured prompting and tool/function calling, ensuring deterministic outputs for downstream systems.
	•	Designed conversation memory strategies (short-term, long-term, and session-based) to support complex multi-turn interactions.
	•	Integrated LLMs with backend services, internal APIs, and databases, enabling actions such as SQL generation, data retrieval, and workflow automation.
	•	Developed evaluation pipelines to measure response quality, relevance, and correctness, enabling iterative prompt and architecture improvements.
	•	Owned AI features end-to-end: requirements → design → implementation → deployment → monitoring.
	•	Worked closely with product managers to translate ambiguous product requirements into robust LLM system designs.
	•	Actively handled edge cases, failures, hallucinations, and cost trade-offs, implementing guardrails and fallbacks.

Software Engineer (AI / Backend Focus)
Technology Services Company | 2021 – 2023
	•	Built backend services in Python supporting AI-driven features.
	•	Integrated early LLM-based components into existing systems, gaining hands-on experience with real-world constraints.
	•	Developed APIs consumed by AI agents and chat systems.
	•	Worked on logging, monitoring, and debugging production issues.
	•	Collaborated across engineering and product teams in agile environments.

Key Projects
Agentic AI Copilot Platform
	•	Built a multi-agent system using LangGraph with clearly defined nodes for reasoning, tool execution, retrieval, and response synthesis.
	•	Implemented persistent conversational state using checkpoints and memory stores.
	•	Enabled streaming responses for real-time user experience.
	•	Reduced hallucinations by >40% through RAG + structured prompting.

LLM-Powered SQL Query Generator
	•	Designed a system that converts natural language into safe, validated SQL queries.
	•	Used schema-aware prompting and tool calling to prevent invalid queries.
	•	Added evaluation checks for correctness and performance.
	•	Successfully deployed in a production analytics workflow.

Knowledge-Grounded Chatbot (RAG)
	•	Built an end-to-end RAG pipeline with document ingestion, embedding, vector indexing, and retrieval.
	•	Implemented chunking, metadata filtering, and relevance scoring.
	•	Added fallback strategies when retrieval confidence was low.

Education
Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering / Computer Science
University Name

What Interviewers Notice About Me
	•	I reason clearly about LLM behavior, not just APIs.
	•	I explain why a prompt, architecture, or agent design was chosen.
	•	I understand failure modes and design systems to handle them.
	•	I’ve shipped LLM systems, debugged them in production, and improved them iteratively.
	•	I take ownership, not just tickets.

If you want, next I can:
	•	🔹 Rewrite this for a FAANG-style resume
	•	🔹 Add quantified metrics (even if you don’t have exact numbers)

Proven track record of owning AI features end-to-end, from architecture and prompt design to deployment, monitoring, and iterative quality improvement. Strong at reasoning about LLM limitations, debugging hallucinations, and designing reliable systems that perform consistently in real-world environments.
Core Skills
LLM & AI Systems
	-	Large Language Models (OpenAI, open-source LLMs)
	-	Agentic workflows (LangChain, LangGraph)
	-	Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
	-	Prompt engineering (structured outputs, tool/function calling)
	-	Conversational memory & dialogue state management
	-	Streaming & real-time LLM responses
Backend & Engineering
	-	Python (advanced, production-grade)
	-	REST APIs & service integration
	-	SQL generation & data-driven LLM applications
	-	Error handling, retries, fallbacks, guardrails
	-	Performance & cost optimization for LLM usage
Data & Infra
	-	Vector databases: FAISS, Chroma, Pinecone
	-	Embeddings & vector search
	-	Docker, containerized deployments
	-	Monitoring & logging for AI systems
Evaluation & Quality
	-	Qualitative + quantitative LLM evaluation
	-	Custom scoring, regression tests for prompts
	-	Debugging hallucinations & edge cases
	-	Continuous improvement loops
Professional Experience
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer
AI / SaaS Product Company | 2023 – Present
	-	Designed, built, and shipped production-grade LLM applications used by real users, focusing on reliability, scalability, and predictable behavior.
	-	Architected agentic workflows using LangGraph, enabling multi-step reasoning, tool execution, and stateful dialogue flows.
	-	Built RAG pipelines using vector databases (FAISS / Chroma) to ground LLM responses in internal knowledge bases and reduce hallucinations.
	-	Implemented structured prompting and tool/function calling, ensuring deterministic outputs for downstream systems.
	-	Designed conversation memory strategies (short-term, long-term, and session-based) to support complex multi-turn interactions.
	-	Integrated LLMs with backend services, internal APIs, and databases, enabling actions such as SQL generation, data retrieval, and workflow automation.
	-	Developed evaluation pipelines to measure response quality, relevance, and correctness, enabling iterative prompt and architecture improvements.
	-	Owned AI features end-to-end: requirements → design → implementation → deployment → monitoring.
	-	Worked closely with product managers to translate ambiguous product requirements into robust LLM system designs.
	-	Actively handled edge cases, failures, hallucinations, and cost trade-offs, implementing guardrails and fallbacks.
Software Engineer (AI / Backend Focus)
Technology Services Company | 2021 – 2023
	-	Built backend services in Python supporting AI-driven features.
	-	Integrated early LLM-based components into existing systems, gaining hands-on experience with real-world constraints.
	-	Developed APIs consumed by AI agents and chat systems.
	-	Worked on logging, monitoring, and debugging production issues.
	-	Collaborated across engineering and product teams in agile environments.
Key Projects
Agentic AI Copilot Platform
	-	Built a multi-agent system using LangGraph with clearly defined nodes for reasoning, tool execution, retrieval, and response synthesis.
	-	Implemented persistent conversational state using checkpoints and memory stores.
	-	Enabled streaming responses for real-time user experience.
	-	Reduced hallucinations by >40% through RAG + structured prompting.
LLM-Powered SQL Query Generator
	-	Designed a system that converts natural language into safe, validated SQL queries.
	-	Used schema-aware prompting and tool calling to prevent invalid queries.
	-	Added evaluation checks for correctness and performance.
	-	Successfully deployed in a production analytics workflow.
Knowledge-Grounded Chatbot (RAG)
	-	Built an end-to-end RAG pipeline with document ingestion, embedding, vector indexing, and retrieval.
	-	Implemented chunking, metadata filtering, and relevance scoring.
	-	Added fallback strategies when retrieval confidence was low.
Education
Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering / Computer Science
University Name
What Interviewers Notice About Me
	-	I reason clearly about LLM behavior, not just APIs.
	-	I explain why a prompt, architecture, or agent design was chosen.
	-	I understand failure modes and design systems to handle them.
	-	I’ve shipped LLM systems, debugged them in production, and improved them iteratively.
	-	I take ownership, not just tickets.

	-	🔹 Rewrite this for a FAANG-style resume
	-	🔹 Add quantified metrics (even if you don’t have exact numbers)
	-	🔹 Prepare interview talking points mapped line-by-line to this resume

Got it — I’ll give you one strong, interview-ready resume that is tightly matched to this Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer role.
This is hands-on, production-focused, and written to trigger “this person has actually shipped LLM systems” signals.
You can copy-paste this directly and tweak names/company if needed.

Supriya Bahubali Chougale
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer
📍 India | 💼 Open to Remote/Hybrid
📧 your.email@email.com | 🔗 LinkedIn | 🔗 GitHub

Professional Summary
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer with 3+ years of professional software development experience and deep, hands-on expertise in building, deploying, and scaling production-grade LLM applications.
Specialized in agentic systems, LangChain/LangGraph workflows, RAG pipelines, and multi-turn conversational AI. Proven track record of owning AI features end-to-end, from architecture and prompt design to deployment, monitoring, and iterative quality improvement. Strong at reasoning about LLM limitations, debugging hallucinations, and designing reliable systems that perform consistently in real-world environments.

Core Skills
LLM & AI Systems
	•	Large Language Models (OpenAI, open-source LLMs)
	•	Agentic workflows (LangChain, LangGraph)
	•	Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
	•	Prompt engineering (structured outputs, tool/function calling)
	•	Conversational memory & dialogue state management
	•	Streaming & real-time LLM responses
Backend & Engineering
	•	Python (advanced, production-grade)
	•	REST APIs & service integration
	•	SQL generation & data-driven LLM applications
	•	Error handling, retries, fallbacks, guardrails
	•	Performance & cost optimization for LLM usage
Data & Infra
	•	Vector databases: FAISS, Chroma, Pinecone
	•	Embeddings & vector search
	•	Docker, containerized deployments
	•	Monitoring & logging for AI systems
Evaluation & Quality
	•	Qualitative + quantitative LLM evaluation
	•	Custom scoring, regression tests for prompts
	•	Debugging hallucinations & edge cases
	•	Continuous improvement loops

Professional Experience
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer
AI / SaaS Product Company | 2023 – Present
	•	Designed, built, and shipped production-grade LLM applications used by real users, focusing on reliability, scalability, and predictable behavior.
	•	Architected agentic workflows using LangGraph, enabling multi-step reasoning, tool execution, and stateful dialogue flows.
	•	Built RAG pipelines using vector databases (FAISS / Chroma) to ground LLM responses in internal knowledge bases and reduce hallucinations.
	•	Implemented structured prompting and tool/function calling, ensuring deterministic outputs for downstream systems.
	•	Designed conversation memory strategies (short-term, long-term, and session-based) to support complex multi-turn interactions.
	•	Integrated LLMs with backend services, internal APIs, and databases, enabling actions such as SQL generation, data retrieval, and workflow automation.
	•	Developed evaluation pipelines to measure response quality, relevance, and correctness, enabling iterative prompt and architecture improvements.
	•	Owned AI features end-to-end: requirements → design → implementation → deployment → monitoring.
	•	Worked closely with product managers to translate ambiguous product requirements into robust LLM system designs.
	•	Actively handled edge cases, failures, hallucinations, and cost trade-offs, implementing guardrails and fallbacks.

Software Engineer (AI / Backend Focus)
Technology Services Company | 2021 – 2023
	•	Built backend services in Python supporting AI-driven features.
	•	Integrated early LLM-based components into existing systems, gaining hands-on experience with real-world constraints.
	•	Developed APIs consumed by AI agents and chat systems.
	•	Worked on logging, monitoring, and debugging production issues.
	•	Collaborated across engineering and product teams in agile environments.

Key Projects
Agentic AI Copilot Platform
	•	Built a multi-agent system using LangGraph with clearly defined nodes for reasoning, tool execution, retrieval, and response synthesis.
	•	Implemented persistent conversational state using checkpoints and memory stores.
	•	Enabled streaming responses for real-time user experience.
	•	Reduced hallucinations by >40% through RAG + structured prompting.

LLM-Powered SQL Query Generator
	•	Designed a system that converts natural language into safe, validated SQL queries.
	•	Used schema-aware prompting and tool calling to prevent invalid queries.
	•	Added evaluation checks for correctness and performance.
	•	Successfully deployed in a production analytics workflow.

Knowledge-Grounded Chatbot (RAG)
	•	Built an end-to-end RAG pipeline with document ingestion, embedding, vector indexing, and retrieval.
	•	Implemented chunking, metadata filtering, and relevance scoring.
	•	Added fallback strategies when retrieval confidence was low.

Education
Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering / Computer Science
University Name

What Interviewers Notice About Me
	•	I reason clearly about LLM behavior, not just APIs.
	•	I explain why a prompt, architecture, or agent design was chosen.
	•	I understand failure modes and design systems to handle them.
	•	I’ve shipped LLM systems, debugged them in production, and improved them iteratively.
	•	I take ownership, not just tickets.

If you want, next I can:
	•	🔹 Rewrite this for a FAANG-style resume
	•	🔹 Add quantified metrics (even if you don’t have exact numbers)
	•	🔹 Prepare interview talking points mapped line-by-line to this resume
	•	🔹 Do a mock interview based exactly on this JD
Just tell me what you want next 👌

Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer with 3+ years of professional software development experience and deep, hands-on expertise in building, deploying, and scaling production-grade LLM applications.

Proven track record of owning AI features end-to-end, from architecture and prompt design to deployment, monitoring, and iterative quality improvement. Strong at reasoning about LLM limitations, debugging hallucinations, and designing reliable systems that perform consistently in real-world environments.

Core Skills
LLM & AI Systems
	•	Large Language Models (OpenAI, open-source LLMs)
	•	Agentic workflows (LangChain, LangGraph)
	•	Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
	•	Prompt engineering (structured outputs, tool/function calling)
	•	Conversational memory & dialogue state management
	•	Streaming & real-time LLM responses
Backend & Engineering
	•	Python (advanced, production-grade)
	•	REST APIs & service integration
	•	SQL generation & data-driven LLM applications
	•	Error handling, retries, fallbacks, guardrails
	•	Performance & cost optimization for LLM usage
Data & Infra
	•	Vector databases: FAISS, Chroma, Pinecone
	•	Embeddings & vector search
	•	Docker, containerized deployments
	•	Monitoring & logging for AI systems
Evaluation & Quality
	•	Qualitative + quantitative LLM evaluation
	•	Custom scoring, regression tests for prompts
	•	Debugging hallucinations & edge cases
	•	Continuous improvement loops

Professional Experience
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer
AI / SaaS Product Company | 2023 – Present
	•	Designed, built, and shipped production-grade LLM applications used by real users, focusing on reliability, scalability, and predictable behavior.
	•	Architected agentic workflows using LangGraph, enabling multi-step reasoning, tool execution, and stateful dialogue flows.
	•	Built RAG pipelines using vector databases (FAISS / Chroma) to ground LLM responses in internal knowledge bases and reduce hallucinations.
	•	Implemented structured prompting and tool/function calling, ensuring deterministic outputs for downstream systems.
	•	Designed conversation memory strategies (short-term, long-term, and session-based) to support complex multi-turn interactions.
	•	Integrated LLMs with backend services, internal APIs, and databases, enabling actions such as SQL generation, data retrieval, and workflow automation.
	•	Developed evaluation pipelines to measure response quality, relevance, and correctness, enabling iterative prompt and architecture improvements.
	•	Owned AI features end-to-end: requirements → design → implementation → deployment → monitoring.
	•	Worked closely with product managers to translate ambiguous product requirements into robust LLM system designs.
	•	Actively handled edge cases, failures, hallucinations, and cost trade-offs, implementing guardrails and fallbacks.

Software Engineer (AI / Backend Focus)
Technology Services Company | 2021 – 2023
	•	Built backend services in Python supporting AI-driven features.
	•	Integrated early LLM-based components into existing systems, gaining hands-on experience with real-world constraints.
	•	Developed APIs consumed by AI agents and chat systems.
	•	Worked on logging, monitoring, and debugging production issues.
	•	Collaborated across engineering and product teams in agile environments.

Key Projects
Agentic AI Copilot Platform
	•	Built a multi-agent system using LangGraph with clearly defined nodes for reasoning, tool execution, retrieval, and response synthesis.
	•	Implemented persistent conversational state using checkpoints and memory stores.
	•	Enabled streaming responses for real-time user experience.
	•	Reduced hallucinations by >40% through RAG + structured prompting.

LLM-Powered SQL Query Generator
	•	Designed a system that converts natural language into safe, validated SQL queries.
	•	Used schema-aware prompting and tool calling to prevent invalid queries.
	•	Added evaluation checks for correctness and performance.
	•	Successfully deployed in a production analytics workflow.

Knowledge-Grounded Chatbot (RAG)
	•	Built an end-to-end RAG pipeline with document ingestion, embedding, vector indexing, and retrieval.
	•	Implemented chunking, metadata filtering, and relevance scoring.
	•	Added fallback strategies when retrieval confidence was low.

Education
Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering / Computer Science
University Name

What Interviewers Notice About Me
	•	I reason clearly about LLM behavior, not just APIs.
	•	I explain why a prompt, architecture, or agent design was chosen.

Professional Summary
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer with 3+ years of professional software development experience and deep, hands-on expertise in building, deploying, and scaling production-grade LLM applications.
Specialized in agentic systems, LangChain/LangGraph workflows, RAG pipelines, and multi-turn conversational AI. Proven track record of owning AI features end-to-end, from architecture and prompt design to deployment, monitoring, and iterative quality improvement. Strong at reasoning about LLM limitations, debugging hallucinations, and designing reliable systems that perform consistently in real-world environments.

Core Skills
LLM & AI Systems
	•	Large Language Models (OpenAI, open-source LLMs)
	•	Agentic workflows (LangChain, LangGraph)
	•	Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
	•	Prompt engineering (structured outputs, tool/function calling)
	•	Conversational memory & dialogue state management
	•	Streaming & real-time LLM responses
Backend & Engineering
	•	Python (advanced, production-grade)
	•	REST APIs & service integration
	•	SQL generation & data-driven LLM applications
	•	Error handling, retries, fallbacks, guardrails
	•	Performance & cost optimization for LLM usage
Data & Infra
	•	Vector databases: FAISS, Chroma, Pinecone
	•	Embeddings & vector search
	•	Docker, containerized deployments
	•	Monitoring & logging for AI systems
Evaluation & Quality
	•	Qualitative + quantitative LLM evaluation
	•	Custom scoring, regression tests for prompts
	•	Debugging hallucinations & edge cases
	•	Continuous improvement loops

Professional Experience
Senior LLM / AI Application Engineer
AI / SaaS Product Company | 2023 – Present
	•	Designed, built, and shipped production-grade LLM applications used by real users, focusing on reliability, scalability, and predictable behavior.
	•	Architected agentic workflows using LangGraph, enabling multi-step reasoning, tool execution, and stateful dialogue flows.
	•	Built RAG pipelines using vector databases (FAISS / Chroma) to ground LLM responses in internal knowledge bases and reduce hallucinations.
	•	Implemented structured prompting and tool/function calling, ensuring deterministic outputs for downstream systems.
	•	Designed conversation memory strategies (short-term, long-term, and session-based) to support complex multi-turn interactions.
	•	Integrated LLMs with backend services, internal APIs, and databases, enabling actions such as SQL generation, data retrieval, and workflow automation.
	•	Developed evaluation pipelines to measure response quality, relevance, and correctness, enabling iterative prompt and architecture improvements.
	•	Owned AI features end-to-end: requirements → design → implementation → deployment → monitoring.
	•	Worked closely with product managers to translate ambiguous product requirements into robust LLM system designs.
	•	Actively handled edge cases, failures, hallucinations, and cost trade-offs, implementing guardrails and fallbacks.

Software Engineer (AI / Backend Focus)
Technology Services Company | 2021 – 2023
	•	Built backend services in Python supporting AI-driven features.
	•	Integrated early LLM-based components into existing systems, gaining hands-on experience with real-world constraints.
	•	Developed APIs consumed by AI agents and chat systems.
	•	Worked on logging, monitoring, and debugging production issues.
	•	Collaborated across engineering and product teams in agile environments.

Key Projects
Agentic AI Copilot Platform
	•	Built a multi-agent system using LangGraph with clearly defined nodes for reasoning, tool execution, retrieval, and response synthesis.
	•	Implemented persistent conversational state using checkpoints and memory stores.
	•	Enabled streaming responses for real-time user experience.
	•	Reduced hallucinations by >40% through RAG + structured prompting.

LLM-Powered SQL Query Generator
	•	Designed a system that converts natural language into safe, validated SQL queries.
	•	Used schema-aware prompting and tool calling to prevent invalid queries.
	•	Added evaluation checks for correctness and performance.
	•	Successfully deployed in a production analytics workflow.

Knowledge-Grounded Chatbot (RAG)
	•	Built an end-to-end RAG pipeline with document ingestion, embedding, vector indexing, and retrieval.
	•	Implemented chunking, metadata filtering, and relevance scoring.
	•	Added fallback strategies when retrieval confidence was low.

Education
Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering / Computer Science
University Name

What Interviewers Notice About Me
	•	I reason clearly about LLM behavior, not just APIs.
	•	I explain why a prompt, architecture, or agent design was chosen.
	•	I understand failure modes and design systems to handle them.
	•	I’ve shipped LLM systems, debugged them in production, and improved them iteratively.
	•	I take ownership, not just tickets.
